data.title: U.S. Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, crypto analyst Trader T has reported a net inflow of $60.99 million into the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF. This development highlights growing investor interest in Ethereum-based financial products.

data.title: Bitget has launched USD-margined IRYS perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USDT-margined IRYS perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x. Contract trading bots will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: Bitwise DOGE spot ETF launched, with a total net inflow of $365,000 into US DOGE spot funds in a single day.
data.description: On November 26th, Eastern Time, the Bitwise Dogecoin ETF (ticker symbol BWOW) officially listed on the NYSE, bringing the total number of listed DOGE spot ETFs to two. According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (November 26th, Eastern Time), the total net inflow into DOGE spot ETFs was $365,000. Specifically, the Bitwise DOGE spot ETF saw no net inflow on its first day of trading, with a trading volume of $2.83 million and a total net asset value of $2.56 million. The Grayscale DOGE spot ETF saw a single-day net inflow of $365,000, with a historical total net inflow of $2.16 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of DOGE spot ETFs is $6.48 million, with a DOGE net asset ratio of 0.03%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $2.16 million. The Bitwise DOGE ETF supports cash/spot creation and redemption, with a management fee of 0.34%.

data.title: BitMart contracts will soon be listed on IRYSUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch IRYSUSDT perpetual contracts on November 27, 2025 at 15:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 20x.

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net outflow of $8.1 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a net outflow of $8.1 million yesterday (November 26th, Eastern Time). The 21Shares SOL spot ETF TSOL saw a net outflow of $34.37 million yesterday (November 26th, Eastern Time), bringing its historical total net outflow to $26.22 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise SOL ETF BSOL, with a net inflow of $13.33 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $528 million. This was followed by the Grayscale SOL ETF GSOL, with a net inflow of $10.42 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $73.5 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $918 million, a net asset value ratio of 1.15%, and a cumulative net inflow of $613 million.

data.description:
Ethereum whale buys 7,318 ETH post-market shift; Edel Finance faces scrutiny.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Powers Over $90K as Buyers Suddenly Regain Control of the Trend
data.description:
Bitcoin price started a recovery wave above $90,000. BTC is now consolidating and might soon aim for a move above the $91,500 zone. Bitcoin started a recovery wave and climbed toward $92,000. The price is trading above $90,000 and the 100 hourly Simple moving average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/btc/bitcoin-price-powers-over-90k/

data.title: Whale Profits $11 Million from ETH Shorting Strategy
data.description: According to PANews, a prominent cryptocurrency investor has reportedly earned $11.04 million over a span of 210 days, primarily by shorting Ethereum (ETH). The investor is currently doubling down on this strategy with a 25x leverage, holding a position valued at $28.75 million. The entry price for this position is $3,032, with a liquidation price set at $3,503. As of now, the position is experiencing a floating loss of $87,210.

data.title: A whale that previously profited $11 million by shorting ETH deposited $4 million in USDC into HyperLiquid to increase its ETH short position.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited $4 million USDC into HyperLiquid to increase its $34.83 million ETH 25x leveraged short position, with a liquidation price of $3,587.25. This whale had previously profited $11 million primarily by shorting ETH.

data.title: The Era of Decentralized Token Folios: What to Expect from this Top Crypto Index?
data.description:
Key Insights: CoinMarketCap 20 Index or the CMC20, an index that tracks the top 20 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization rose by 89. 69% this week. Coinmarketcap launched the index on November 17 and listed it on top of Bitcoin on the list of the largest cryptocurrencies by market cap
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/26/the-era-of-decentralized-token-folios-what-to-expect-from-this-top-crypto-index/

data.title: ETH total open interest in futures contracts increased by 6.70% in the past 24 hours.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, the total open interest of ETH futures contracts increased by 6.70% in the past 24 hours, currently standing at $37.76 billion. The top three open interest providers are Binance, CME, and Gate, with Binance holding $7.67 billion, CME $6.49 billion, and Gate $3.7 billion.

data.description:
Some have previously suggested that SpaceX was simply transferring bitcoin in an effort to consolidate its holdings.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/380651/spacex-105-million-bitcoin?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Pi Network and CiDi Games have entered into a strategic partnership to jointly build a Web3 gaming ecosystem.
data.description: Pi Network announced a strategic partnership with gaming platform CiDi Games, with Pi Network Ventures making a strategic investment in CiDi Games. CiDi Games will deeply integrate Pi as the core medium for payments, transactions, and incentives within its platform, and will develop APIs and infrastructure to support other games in the Pi ecosystem. The company's first H5 gaming platform is scheduled for official testing in the first quarter of 2026, offering a rich library of content ranging from casual HTML5 games to flagship crypto-native titles.

data.title: The market capitalization of Monad ecosystem's Meme coin, CHOG, briefly surpassed $10 million.
data.description: Market data shows that the market capitalization of CHOG, the Meme coin within the Monad ecosystem, briefly surged past $10 million, currently standing at $10.05 million, with a 24-hour trading volume exceeding $17 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: Crypto markets rallied across the board, with BTC breaking $90,000 and ETH returning above $3,000.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the crypto market generally rose, with Bitcoin (BTC) up 2.96%, breaking through $90,000; Ethereum (ETH) rose 2.05%, returning above $3,000. Furthermore, the RWA sector performed strongly, rising 4.11%, with Pendle (PENDLE) up 8.96%, Sky (SKY) up 7.67%, and Ondo Finance (ONDO) up 3.54%. Notably, MAG7.ssi rose 2.22%, DEFI.ssi rose 2.72%, and MEME.ssi rose 1.11%. In other sectors, the Layer 2 sector rose 4.04%, with Merlin Chain (MERL) surging 134.56%; the CeFi sector rose 2.38%, with Gate (GT) rising 5.60%; the Layer 1 sector rose 2.21%, with Kaspa (KAS) rising 14.53%; the DeFi sector rose 1.57%, with Hyperliquid (HYPE) rising 5.56%; the Meme sector rose 1.29%, with SPX6900 (SPX) rising 12.30%; the PayFi sector rose 0.93%, with Dash (DASH) rising 17.01% due to factors such as its listing on OKX spot trading. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance show that the ssiRWA, ssiCeFi, and ssiLayer1 indices rose 4.97%, 3.11%, and 2.40%, respectively.

data.title: Tether CEO responds to S&P ratings: "We take pride in the hatred of rating agencies; the traditional financial system is riddled with problems."
data.description: In response to S&P's downgrade of Tether's stability rating to the lowest level, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino posted on the X platform, stating, "Regarding S&P's rating of Tether: We are proud of your hatred. Historically, classic rating models built for traditional financial institutions have led private and institutional investors to invest their wealth in companies that failed despite being rated investment grade. This has prompted regulators around the world to question such models and the independence and objectivity of all major rating agencies. When any company tries to defy the gravitational pull of this fragmented financial system, the traditional financial propaganda machine becomes concerned. No company should dare to deviate from this system. (In this context) Tether has built the first overcapacity company in the financial industry, without any toxic asset reserves. Yet, it remains highly profitable. Tether's actions prove that the traditional financial system is so riddled with holes that even the 'clothless emperors' are afraid."

data.title: A whale deposited $4 million into Hyperliquid and opened a $20 million short position in HYPE.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, whale 0xbFC8...43aA deposited 4 million USDC into Hyperliquid 2 hours ago and opened a 10x short position on 554,542 HYPE (worth $20.15 million).

data.title: UK Explores Expansion of Treasury Bill Issuance to Boost Pound Market
data.description: According to Foresight News, the UK is contemplating an expansion of its treasury bill issuance program, a move that could enhance the pound currency market and cater to potential new buyers such as stablecoin issuers. The UK's Debt Management Office (DMO) plans to initiate consultations in January to "expand and deepen" the ultra-short-term debt market. Other governments, including the United States, have increasingly relied on treasury bills to meet their financing needs.

data.title: Whale Activity Highlights: Significant Moves in Crypto Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring by Hyperinsight and several on-chain analysts has revealed notable movements among prominent crypto whales over the past 24 hours.

The '1011 Insider Whale' has maintained its position, with its Ethereum (ETH) long position at five times leverage now showing an unrealized profit exceeding $1.1 million. There have been no changes in its holdings.

'Maji' has continued to roll over its positions, closing its Bitcoin (BTC) long position this morning and reopening long positions in ETH and HYPE. As of the latest update, 'Maji's' long positions have increased to $23.85 million, with further additions ongoing.

A whale known for a 100% success rate this week initiated a three-times leveraged short position on BTC six hours ago, with a holding amount of $90.3 million and an average entry price of $89,765.6. Data indicates that this whale has achieved a profit of $11.29 million in just 50 days.

In addition to these whales, several others have shown significant divergence in their positions on major cryptocurrencies, with opening amounts exceeding $10 million last night and this morning.

Furthermore, a spot market whale, who interacted with the Ethereum Foundation a decade ago, has been actively increasing its holdings. Starting yesterday, this ancient ETH whale purchased 7,318.56 ETH at an average price of $3,016.09, totaling $22.07 million.

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts Bitcoin Could Reach $100,000 by Year-End
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Tom Lee expressed in a Wednesday interview with CNBC that Bitcoin has a strong chance of surpassing $100,000 by the end of the year, potentially setting a new record. This marks the first time Lee has publicly softened his earlier prediction of a $250,000 Bitcoin price target by the end of 2024 and early October. Despite this adjustment, Lee believes Bitcoin's most robust period may not occur until the end of 2025.
